name: What evidence do I need for my work slip and fall claim in Saint George?
description: Hazard photos, medical records, witnesses, incident report.

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for my work slip and fall claim in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Hazard photos, medical records, witnesses, incident report.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Photos of hazard, incident report, medical records, witness statements, and maintenance logs.** These prove the unsafe condition was known or should have been.[1][2] Key factors: Timestamp photos, get coworker contacts, request employer safety records. Video surveillance helps. Delayed symptoms? Link via doctor notes. Preserve shoes/clothes if defective. An attorney subpoenas hidden evidence.
